title: Supreme Court rejects IAMC review petition challenging quashing of free land allotment by Telangana
description: The Supreme Court has rejected a review petition filed by the International Arbitration and Mediation Centre (IAMC) against a February 2026 order upholding the quashing of allotment of 3.70 acres of government land in Hyderabad to the arbitration centre for free. [The International Arbitration and Mediation Centre v. Koti Raghunatha Rao & Ors]A Bench of Justices Dipankar Datta and SVN Bhatti also rejected IAMC’s application seeking oral hearing in the matter.“Having perused the order under r
